changelog.factoryReset: You can now reset the app to factory state from settings
changelog.deleteTransactions: Delete a transaction by tapping the trash icon
changelog.whatsNewPage: See what's new with every update
changelog.performanceOptimizations: The app is faster and smoother
changelog.malagasyLanguage: The app is now available in Malagasy
changelog.darkMode: Dark mode for comfortable use at night
changelog.feedbackModal: Share your ideas and suggestions directly in the app
changelog.currencyConversion: Switch currencies easily with live exchange rates
changelog.multipleAccounts: Manage multiple accounts: bank, cash and more
changelog.transferBetweenAccounts: Transfer money between your accounts in one tap
changelog.planificationSystem: Plan your expenses ahead of time
changelog.planificationGrouping: Planification transactions are grouped into a single card
changelog.autoDeleteEmptyPlanification: Planification is automatically deleted when all its transactions are removed
changelog.deleteModalNames: Names now display correctly in delete confirmation modals
changelog.gamificationSystem: Gamification system: earn XP and level up by tracking your finances
changelog.streaksAndChallenges: Daily streaks and challenges to keep you motivated
changelog.badgesAndAchievements: Badges and achievements to unlock as you manage your money
changelog.xpAndLevels: XP and level system with progress bar
changelog.dailyChallenges: Daily challenge to stay on top of your finances
changelog.reportsScreen: Reports screen: trend charts, category breakdown and detailed stats
changelog.calendarScreen: Expense calendar: view your spending day by day
changelog.reducedRedundancy: Cleaner interface with less repeated data across screens
changelog.transferFilter: Transfer filter now correctly shows transfers
changelog.transferNotCountedAsExpense: Transfers are no longer counted as expenses

gamification.challengeCompleted: Great job! Challenge completed. You're mastering your money.
gamification.levelUpMessage: You're taking control of your finances! Every step brings you closer to your goals.
gamification.challengeLogExpense: Track a spending to stay in control
gamification.challengeLog3: 3 transactions to keep your day on track
gamification.challengeCheckPlan: Review your plans to stay organized
gamification.challengeLogIncome: Log an income and watch your money grow
gamification.challengeCreatePlan: Plan your budget for better savings
gamification.badgeFirstExpenseDesc: Nice! You started tracking your finances
gamification.badgeStreak3Desc: You're building a great financial habit
gamification.badgeStreak7Desc: 7 days of tracking! You manage money like a pro
gamification.badgeStreak30Desc: 30 days! You're on the path to financial freedom
gamification.badgeXP500Desc: Your financial discipline is paying off
gamification.badgeLevel5Desc: You're mastering your finances better than ever
gamification.badgeTransactions50Desc: 50 entries! You have a clear view of your money
